title: Swiggy Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Swiggy Digital Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Meerut office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Swiggy Digital Technologies:
Swiggy Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Digital Technologies!
